science.schoolName: Kaizen Education Foundation dba Gilbert Arts Academy
science.districtName: Kaizen Education Foundation dba Gilbert Arts Academy
science.subject: Science

narrative.headline: Science: not enough post-2020 data for a forecast
narrative.summarySentence: This school does not have enough numeric FAY All Students history to publish a trend forecast.
narrative.caveatSentence: Suppression or sparse history limits what can be inferred from the available assessment record.
narrative.recommendedReviewPrompt: Review grade-level and subgroup trends before making school support decisions.

english-language-arts.schoolName: Kaizen Education Foundation dba Gilbert Arts Academy
english-language-arts.districtName: Kaizen Education Foundation dba Gilbert Arts Academy
english-language-arts.subject: English Language Arts

narrative.headline: English Language Arts: improving
narrative.summarySentence: FAY All Students English Language Arts percent passing changed by about 4.1 percentage points per year across 2022,2023,2024,2025.
narrative.evidenceSentence: Fitted years: 2022,2023,2024,2025. FY2026 indicator 49.0 with likely range 42.0-56.0 (8 of 10 backtested forecasts landed within this band).
narrative.caveatSentence: This is a descriptive trend forecast, not a causal claim about what produced the pattern. The FY2030 value is an illustration of where the school would land if the recent yearly trend simply continued; it is not a decision-ready prediction.
narrative.recommendedReviewPrompt: Review grade-level and subgroup trends before making school support decisions.

mathematics.schoolName: Kaizen Education Foundation dba Gilbert Arts Academy
mathematics.districtName: Kaizen Education Foundation dba Gilbert Arts Academy
mathematics.subject: Mathematics

narrative.headline: Mathematics: improving
narrative.summarySentence: FAY All Students Mathematics percent passing changed by about 4.8 percentage points per year across 2022,2023,2024,2025.
narrative.evidenceSentence: Fitted years: 2022,2023,2024,2025. FY2026 indicator 46.0 with likely range 39.0-53.0 (8 of 10 backtested forecasts landed within this band).
narrative.caveatSentence: This is a descriptive trend forecast, not a causal claim about what produced the pattern. The FY2030 value is an illustration of where the school would land if the recent yearly trend simply continued; it is not a decision-ready prediction.
narrative.recommendedReviewPrompt: Review grade-level and subgroup trends before making school support decisions.
